description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push to master, pull requests to master, and on release events. The workflow should have three jobs: build, pack, and two publish jobs. The build job should run on an ubuntu-22.04 environment with a matrix strategy for different architectures, build and package the code using Docker, and upload the resulting prebuilds as artifacts. The pack job should download the prebuilds, coalesce them, and create a package tarball. The two publish jobs should trigger on release events, download the package tarball, and publish it to either npm or GitHub Packages.
